summary: Gamification & Leaderboard v2 system testing complete. All backend APIs (store/org/global) working. All frontend features verified: 3-tier tabs, period pills, category filters, Your Rank card with level/streak/vs_avg, podium with gold/silver/bronze badges, ranked list. Global view properly anonymizes names.

minor.issue: Response doesn't include 'period' field in JSON (accepts param but doesn't echo it back)

backend_store_leaderboard.details: GET /api/leaderboard/v2/store/{user_id} returns leaderboard with your_stats, level, streak, vs_avg, team_summary

backend_global_leaderboard.details: GET /api/leaderboard/v2/global/{user_id} returns anonymized global leaderboard with display_name, is_you marker, level per entry

backend_category_filter.details: category parameter re-sorts leaderboard (total, digital_cards, reviews, cards, emails, sms, calls, tasks)

backend_level_system.details: Level thresholds correct: Rookie(0-50), Hustler(51-200), Closer(201-500), All-Star(501-1000), Legend(1001+)

backend_streak_calculation.details: Streak returns consecutive days of task completion

frontend_tier_tabs.details: My Team / My Org / Global tabs switch views correctly

frontend_period_pills.details: This Week / This Month / All Time pills reload data

frontend_category_filter_pills.details: Total, Digital Cards, Reviews, Cards Sent, Emails, SMS, Calls, Tasks Done pills re-sort the board

frontend_your_rank_card.details: Shows rank #1, Hustler level badge, 1d streak, 150 pts, +0 vs team avg (150), progress bar to Closer

frontend_podium_top3.details: Podium displays top 3 with gold (#1), silver (#2), bronze (#3) colors

frontend_ranked_list.details: Remaining users shown with avatars/initials and scores

frontend_global_anonymization.details: Global view shows anonymized names (User #2, User #3, FW for current user) and no photos

critical_code_review_comments: Level thresholds correctly implemented: Rookie(0-50), Hustler(51-200), Closer(201-500), All-Star(501-1000), Legend(1001+)
Streak calculation checks up to 60 days back for consecutive task completions
Global leaderboard properly anonymizes with display_name and removes photos
Category sorting includes tasks completion as a scoring category
Period filtering uses date ranges: week=7 days, month=30 days, all=no filter
data-testid attributes added for tier tabs, period pills, category pills, your-rank-card
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user Forest Ward with 150 total points
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leaderboard v2 gamification system fully implemented. 3 tiers (store/org/global), level system with 5 titles (Rookie/Hustler/Closer/All-Star/Legend), streak tracking, you vs avg comparison, period filtering (week/month/all), 8 category filters. Forest Ward is ranked #1 with 150 points and Hustler level.
